title: Scholarship Trials (Phase-2)
content: Event Date: 12th October 2024. Event brief description – The Sports Scholarship Trials (Phase-2) at Galgotias University are designed to identify and support talented athletes across various sports disciplines’ Galgotias University offers a comprehensive Sports Scholarship program to recognize and support talented athletes across various disciplines. The scholarship process involves multiple phases, including the Sports Trials (Phase-2), which are crucial for evaluating candidates' skills and awarding scholarships. Event Detailed Description- Galgotias University sports department conducted Scholarship Trials (Phase-1). Date: 12-10-2024. To ensure maximum participation, the university adopted a multi-platform communication approach. Detailed information about the trials, including eligibility criteria and registration guidelines, was circulated through Email, Instagram, WhatsApp, and other digital channels. A dedicated registration link was shared in all communications, making it easy for students to sign up and participate. The outreach strategy proved highly effective, generating strong interest among aspiring athletes. Around 200 students from various parts of the country registered for the trials, eager to showcase their skills and compete for scholarship opportunities. The trials covered a wide range of sports including athletics, basketball, volleyball, football, badminton, and more. Department Name –Sports Department. Event Outcome – The Sports Scholarship Trials (Phase-2) at Galgotias University serve as a pivotal step in identifying and supporting exceptional athletic talent among students. The outcome of this event is determined through a structured evaluation process that assesses candidates' sports achievements and performance in trials. Strengthened Sense of Belonging Identification of Talent for Future Support
